features.summaryKey: Rate effort for each set with a redesigned slider — Apple Watch estimates RPE automatically from heart rate.
Track stair climber workouts and count flights climbed alongside steps and heart rate.
See your VO2 Max automatically captured from HealthKit during cardio workouts.
Swipe through metrics, controls, and Now Playing on a multi-page cardio screen inspired by Apple Fitness.
Earn milestone badges for consistency and volume, and review your achievement history.
Get a personalized sleep deficit breakdown with average bedtime trends and recovery guidance.
Auto-track workout achievements, set recurring habit cycles, and get checklist reminders on time.
